{{ 'SHARED.COMMON.WIZARD.COMPLETION_TEXT' | translate: { entity: 'User' } }}

{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.NAME' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().name || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.EMAIL_ADDRESS' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().emailAddress || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.MOBILE_NUMBER' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().mobile || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
@if (newUser().costCentre) {
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.COST_CENTRE' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().costCentre?.name || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.TIMEZONE' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().timeZoneId || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.DEFAULT_CLIENT' | translate }}:
{{ newUser().defaultClient?.name || ('SHARED.COMMON.NOT_PROVIDED' | translate) }}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.DETAILS.FIELDS.SEND_INVITE' | translate }}:
{{ newUser()['invite'] ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}
{{ 'ADMIN.USERS.ROLES.FIELDS.ROLES' | translate }}:
{{ getRoleNames(newUser().roles) }}

{{ 'SHARED.COMMON.WIZARD.FINISH_PROMPT' | translate: { entity: 'User' } }}
